Complaint Text: Our production machine has stopped again. This is the third time we are reporting this issue. Our operations are blocked and we need immediate support.
Expected Notes: Production stopped and repeated issue; critical escalation required.

Complaint Text: I received an invoice with a duplicate charge. The amount is incorrect and I need a corrected invoice.
Expected Notes: Financial correction required; finance review needed.

Complaint Text: My delivery was supposed to arrive yesterday, but the shipment is still missing and there is no update.
Expected Notes: Standard delivery delay without business-critical impact.

Complaint Text: The product overheated during operation and may create a safety risk for our staff.
Expected Notes: Safety risk mentioned; critical escalation and human review required.

Complaint Text: We are considering legal action because this issue has not been resolved despite multiple complaints.
Expected Team: Service Manager / Legal or Compliance Team
Expected Notes: Legal threat and repeated unresolved complaint.

Complaint Text: Your support team has not responded to my previous email for five days. This is very disappointing.
Expected Notes: Service delay and negative sentiment, but no critical business impact.

Complaint Text: The delivered product is damaged and cannot be used. We need a replacement urgently.
Expected Notes: Damaged unusable product with urgent replacement request.

Complaint Text: I want to return the product and request a refund because it does not meet the agreed requirements.
The wrong item was delivered to our warehouse, and our order fulfilment is now delayed.
Expected Notes: Wrong item affects warehouse/order fulfilment; business impact present.

Complaint Text: I have a question about how to update my service address for future deliveries.
Expected Notes: Simple information request; no escalation needed.
